name: wheat_war_first_farm
description: The Wheat War opener (q.side_wheat) end-to-end: hear the grain pitch from Sedge, the Mystic Marsh wheat trader (heard_wheat_pitch), then take Firstfurrow Farm - beat Yield Officer Ming at the fence, then Acting Site Manager Jun by the barn, whose on_win fires liberation/free_field farm_1 (wheat_war_active + the FIRSTFURROW LIBERATED ceremony) so the sidebar objective lights. Assumes a fresh-ish test player - badges < 3 (recognition early, so the ungated fence_hail/quota entries show) and no prereq quest tags (none are needed); the preamble re-arms the two farm latches and gives a level-50 Garchomp for dev-bot autobattle (re-runs accumulate one per run, same caveat as first_steps' starter).

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag the chain sets, the liberation latch, the memo book, the two farm bodies + their one-shot ambient latches --
-- tp BEFORE the kills: kill needs loaded chunks; running it from spawn no-ops silently, then the latch reset below spawns a DUPLICATE body (found 5 stacked Mings after a week of runs) --
-- setup: daylight for the route legs, a battle-capable party, autobattle armed for both farm fights --
-- party reset: prior scenarios crowd the party with lv-5s and push the fighter to the PC; a junk party stalls the TBCS battle init (verified live). Empty to one slot, then the Garchomp. --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=50

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the pitch. Sedge, Willowmire Causeway (Mystic Marsh). say[] lines roll randomly, so the screen assert targets the stable trade-button label; 'I will keep my coin' sets heard_wheat_pitch and closes --

-- beat 2: Firstfurrow Farm north fence. Ming has sight (range 10, fence_hail) and may auto-hail during the settle sleep; interact_npc is a direct entity interact, so it just re-opens the same fence_hail entry --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up

steps.comment: -- beat 3: mid-field to the barn. Jun's fight button is gated on the Officer's defeat tag; its appearing IS the gate assert --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up

steps.comment: -- the win chain (anchored at the click): @2 win line, then free_field farm_1 -> actionbar + FIRSTFURROW ceremony title --
-- state asserts: defeat + memo tags, the one-way field latch, the shared counter, the memo book, and both q.side_wheat if_tags together --

steps.rcon: execute if score farm_1 field_freed matches 1
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
